selection_policy: Project-only batch; no entity, route, or corridor aliases proposed.
Require alias_id and target_id to exist in current data/canonical/projects.jsonl.
Exclude aliases already present under data/identity-overrides/merges.json aliases.project.
Exclude targets that are themselves alias-mapped in current project merges to avoid target chains.
Exclude pairs matching current project do-not-merge guards.
Exclude records already used as project alias or target in prior codex identity prep artifacts.
Prefer exact project/package/contract names with shared validator identity keys and compatible payload scope.
Reject broad parent-program/subproject, financing-resolution/program, agency-wide, or cross-agency scope matches even when they share a weak identity key.

specific_exclusions.reason: Current do-not-merge guard documents parent-program versus child-project distinction.

specific_exclusions.candidate_area: ABLE Program / ABLE Expansion / ABLE camera expansion
specific_exclusions.reason: Some pairs are parent program, expansion wave, or route-specific expansion records rather than guaranteed same project identity.

specific_exclusions.candidate_area: CBD tolling / congestion relief revenue obligations / TransCore modification
specific_exclusions.reason: Some records are program, financing resolution, or contract-modification facets rather than exact project aliases.

specific_exclusions.candidate_area: Woodhaven 2017 Street Improvement / 79th Street 2017 Street Improvement
specific_exclusions.reason: Shared key appears broad or contaminated across distinct locations.

command_evidence.command: pwd && rg --files data/identity-overrides data/canonical data/review_notes | sort
command_evidence.purpose: Confirmed repo root and available identity override, canonical, and review-note inputs.
Confirmed the worktree is busy and treated all unrelated changes as off-limits.
Skimmed project log as instructed; did not edit it.
Matched current review-note conventions while keeping this batch project-only.
Read current project merge override shape and counted 229 project aliases.
Read current project do-not-merge guards and counted one project guard.
Confirmed 1977 current canonical project records and inspected JSONL shape.

command_evidence.command: bun --eval import validateRepo from ./packages/pipeline/src/validate.ts and print project duplicate_global_identity issues
command_evidence.purpose: Read-only validator evidence; found 154 project duplicate_global_identity issues without running CLI validate.

command_evidence.command: bun --eval import identityKeysForRecord from ./packages/db/src/identity.ts and mine project duplicate pairs with merge, do-not-merge, stale-record, target-chain, and prior-prep filters
command_evidence.purpose: Generated deterministic local candidate list for manual high-confidence selection.

command_evidence.command: bun --eval selected-pair guard/evidence check over projects.jsonl, merges.json, do-not-merge.json, identityKeysForRecord, and raw/sources/*/blocks.jsonl
command_evidence.purpose: Verified selected aliases and targets exist, are not already mapped, have no project do-not-merge hit, share validator keys, and cite present raw evidence blocks.
Excluded prior project prep aliases and targets from this batch.

forbidden_commands_not_run: No full CLI validate command was run.
No write, ask, schema, ontology, identity-review, canonicalize, campaign, or dedup commands were run.
No LOG.md, manifest, canonical JSONL, wiki page, DB, generated output, submission, or submission override edit was made.
